# Transcrição: 02 Transition Into The Lie

- **Duração:** 01:12

## [00:00 - 01:12]

Now, transition into the line. I've given you an example slide here. Here's how I would go into it. The real problem is the fact that you've been lied to for years, and these lies are keeping you from the body you desire and deserve. There's a lot of wordsmithing going on here. The real problem, notice that, that's going to jump right out at you because I've chosen to highlight that in red, is the fact. I always say, and this is always, this is a good wordsmithing tip, by the way, don't say is that you've been lied to for years. Say it's the fact or the proven fact, because it is. It's a fact, so people are more apt to believe that, that you've been lied to for years, and these lies, there's more than one. Again, we're going to create more than one lie unless you don't have more than one lie, then it's fine to use one, but most people have two to three lies that they can share with their users, and they say, you know what, you may believe this, but it's not true, and you may also believe this, and that's not true either. You're going to get to the truth in the bigger solution. Look what these lies are doing. They're keeping you from the body that you desire and deserve. So in other words, I didn't say keeping you from losing weight. I said keeping you from the body you desire and deserve. Desire and deserve are what? Power words. Those are very enticing power words.
